text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm making my way<n>through the
school halls...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: What's wrong? Do you feel sick?
What's wrong? Do you feel sick?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Not really, but... Well, actually, yeah.<n>Kinda.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So I bought this viral tail oil<n>everyone's been
raving about on<n>Umastagram...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But it makes my tail all sticky when I<n>run! And
then all this dirt and grass<n>gets stuck in it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I was gonna go out with my friends,<n>but I can't
let them see me with my<n>tail looking gross as
hell...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, real talk? Tail care is already a<n>literal pain
in the butt, and this just<n>made it so much worse.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, this high-key sucks!<n>Especially on the
muddy courses! No<n>matter how much I wash my
tail after,<n>there's still mud in it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But I'm kinda stuck on what to do<n>now. I spent
good money on this<n>garbage, so I don't wanna
throw it<n>away...
choice_data_list: You can just use it on your days off.
You can use it for something else.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're so right! I'll just use it when I<n>don't have
to run!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
All right, problem solved! As a reward,<n>I'm gonna
go buy myself some<n>snacks!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What can I even use it for if not as an<n>oil
treatment, though?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hang on, lemme look it up... "You can<n>add it to
normal conditioner to boost its<n>quality."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Talk about a luck break! Looks like I<n>didn't
waste my money after all.<n>Thanks for the save! ☆
